channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Java (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Java nel periodo weekly.

item.title: ☕ youxiandechilun/Guido (102 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: youxiandechilun

📝 Repository: youxiandechilun/Guido

📄 Descrizione: 景区导览服务 AI 数字人：基于 Spring Boot、Vue 3、UniApp 与本地 RAG 的智能导览系统。

⭐ Stelle: 102

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: ai digital-human java mysql rag spring-boot sse uniapp vue3

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-14T23:53:28Z

]]>

item.title: ☕ openlink2/link-onvif-client (20 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: openlink2

📝 Repository: openlink2/link-onvif-client

📄 Descrizione: A modern Java ONVIF client/toolkit. Features a lightweight, embeddable core with full support for WS-Discovery, PTZ control, and secure device management via SOAP/WS-Security. Includes a Spring Boot dashboard and a picocli command-line tool.

⭐ Stelle: 20

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: camera-management device-discovery iot ip-camera java nvr onvif onvif-client onvif-discovery onvifclient ptz-control rtsp soap video-streaming

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-11T20:50:56Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-13T03:26:41Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ KHolodilin/spring-transactional-outbox-kafka (11 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: KHolodilin

📝 Repository: KHolodilin/spring-transactional-outbox-kafka

📄 Descrizione: Production-ready Transactional Outbox Pattern for Spring Boot 4 with Kafka and PostgreSQL, featuring idempotency, batch publishing and an optimized low-polling architecture for high-throughput event delivery.

⭐ Stelle: 11

🍴 Forks: 5

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: kafka outbox outbox-pattern postgresql spring-boot transactional-outbox transactional-outbox-pattern

item.title: ☕ huxuehao/apboa-next (11 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: huxuehao

📝 Repository: huxuehao/apboa-next

📄 Descrizione: Apboa Next是基于React理念的智能体开发平台，让复杂开发简单高效。提供敏感词过滤、提示词工坊、多模型接入、工具集成、知识库与编排管理等全链路方案，模块无缝整合。 新版本后台拆分为5个服务、1个控制台、3个可扩展运行时及1个消息服务，支持分布式部署与弹性扩容；前端强化多租户与权限隔离。支持多Session并行、消息后端存储、状态自动保存及断流续传，新增文档识别，全面突破智能体边界。

⭐ Stelle: 11

🍴 Forks: 3

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-06T13:12:57Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-11T09:31:48Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

📄 Descrizione: MiniAPIRouter — 轻量级 AI API 智能路由网关。统一接入 OpenAI / Anthropic 等多模型，基于意图识别与多策略（权重 / 优先级 / 轮询 / 最少连接）智能分发请求，支持协议自动转换、流式代理与故障转移。
